ops.title: Layer 2 Design вЂ” Pure Engine Economics & Policy
ops.body:
# Layer 2 вЂ” Pure engine: economics + policy (deterministic, CI-testable)

## Context

Layer 1 of cc-squash is **done on `main`** (CI-green, live-proven): the axum+reqwest RelayCore
forwards real CC sessions unchanged, the Go control plane supervises the Rust proxy over `proxy.sock`,
and `decide(&bytes)` at `crates/ccs-proxy/src/relay.rs:62` is the seam where the compaction engine will
plug in. Today that seam only runs the v0 `<summary>` synth detector. Nothing prices a squash yet.

Layer 2 builds the **algorithmic heart as pure, deterministic, no-I/O Rust** вЂ” the cache-economics cost
model and the lossy-ladder policy вЂ” ported from the architecture spec (`cc-squash-architecture.md:413-702`)
and bioqa (`/Users/yasyf/Code/bioqa/`). It implements build-plan В§3a (segmentation), В§3b
(`ContentDecision`/pre-gates/strategy + true-human pin), and В§3e/В§3f (two-layer budget, lossy ladder, NPV
gate). The outcome is a fully unit/property-tested engine that **emits prescriptions** (`SquashDecision`,
`Strategy`, `BreakpointPlan`) which Layer 4's Interceptor will later apply to live request bytes.

**Decided this turn (user-confirmed):**
- **Scope = pure crates only.** No Go `config.toml` parser, no seam config-threading, no `SessionCtx`
  `CacheState` field, no SSE usage tap. Those are I/O and belong to Layer 4 where they're consumed.
  Config/tunables are exposed as **types-with-`Default`** in the pure crates so Layer 4 wires the seam
  without redefining the schema. This avoids dead plumbing and matches В§7 "Builds" + the pure/no-I/O framing.
- **3-crate split** (deviates slightly from В§2's two): a tiny leaf `ccs-core` holds shared branded
  newtypes so Layer 3 (`ccs-refs`) and Layer 5 (`ccs-transcript`) can name `RefId`/`SegmentKind` without
  depending on the whole economics crate.

## Approach

### Crate DAG: `ccs-policy в†’ ccs-economics в†’ ccs-core`

One-directional. The would-be cycle (`bust_cost` wants a `SquashBatch` that carries a `Strategy`, which
must live in policy) is broken by a `BatchView` **trait** defined in economics and implemented by
`SquashBatch` in policy.

**`ccs-core`** (leaf, zero logic; deps: `serde`, `strum`)
- `ids.rs` вЂ” `ModelId`, `RefId`, `MessageId` (branded `String` newtypes). **`RefId` exposes only
  `parse(&str)` (validates `"sha256:"` + 64 hex) + `Deserialize` вЂ” NO content-hashing constructor.** The
  sha256-of-bytes computation is `ccs-refs`'s job (Layer 3, sole writer). This makes "policy references but
  never writes a ref" unrepresentable.
- `units.rs` вЂ” `TokenCount(u32)`, `ByteOffset(usize)`, `Generation(u32)`.
- `kind.rs` вЂ” `SegmentKind` {USER_TURN, ASSISTANT_TURN, TOOL_PAIR, SYSTEM, TOOLS} + `ChoiceTag`
  {Truncate, Summarize, Compress, Keep}, both `strum::Display` + serde rename.
- `range.rs` вЂ” `LineRange { start, end }` (shared by `Strategy::Truncate` + `ContentDecision`).
- `estimate.rs` вЂ” `estimate_chars_proxy(&str) -> TokenCount` (chars / 3.5; the only "logic"). The
  calibrated `count_tokens` path is I/O в†’ Layer 4; expose a `TokenEstimator` trait with the char-proxy as
  the default impl. Any injected estimator must be referentially transparent (no clock/RNG).

**`ccs-economics`** (pure cost model; deps: `ccs-core`, `serde`) вЂ” spec at `architecture.md:405-588`
- `model.rs` вЂ” `ModelEconomics { base_input, write_mult, read_mult, min_cache_floor }` + `economics_for(&ModelId)`
  as a `match model.as_str()` (4 rows; no `phf` needed). Constants: Opus 4.8 `(5e-6, 2.0, 0.1, 1024)`;
  Sonnet 4.x `(3e-6, 2.0, 0.1, 1024)`; Haiku 4.5 `(1e-6, 2.0, 0.1, 4096)`. `write_mult` = 2.0 (1h auto) /
  1.25 (5m forced); `read_mult` = 0.1.
- `cache.rs` вЂ” `CacheUsage { cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens, input_tokens }`
  (`Deserialize`; the only economics type that touches the wire, consumed by Layer 4's tap). `CacheState
  { cached_prefix_tokens, last_request_ts, assumed_ttl_s (3600 auto / 300 forced), model, breakpoints }`
  with `idle_seconds(now)`, `p_alive(now)=clamp(1в€’idle/ttl,0,1)`, `is_cold(now)=idleв‰Ґttl`, and `observe(usage,
  now)->CacheState` (pure fold; the *acquisition* of `CacheUsage` is Layer 4).
- `cost.rs` вЂ” `Cost { dollars: f64, tokens: TokenCount }`; the `BatchView` trait (`suffix_tokens() -> S_after`,
  `total_removed() -> i64 T_removed`, `quality_gain() -> f64 Q`); and the four pure fns, all taking
  `now: f64`: `bust_cost` = `0` if cold else `S_afterВ·bВ·(wв€’r)В·p_alive`; `recurring_saving` = `nВ·T_removedВ·bВ·r`;
  `break_even_turns` = `S_afterВ·(wв€’r)/(T_removedВ·r)` (= 19В·S_after/T_removed at w=2,r=0.1; 11.5 at 5m);
  `npv` = `recurring_saving + Q в€’ bust_cost`.

**`ccs-policy`** (pure decision engine; deps: `ccs-core`, `ccs-economics`, `serde`, `serde_json`+`RawValue`,
`memchr`, `strum`) вЂ” spec at `architecture.md:450-702`, bioqa `context.py`/`compaction.py`/`requester.py`
- `wire.rs` вЂ” **the serde parse boundary.** `WireBody<'a> { model, system: Option<&'a RawValue>, tools,
  messages: Vec<WireMessage<'a>>, max_tokens }`; `ContentBlock<'a>` enum over `&'a RawValue` arms (Text,
  ToolUse, ToolResult, Thinking, RedactedThinking, ServerToolUse, ServerToolResult, **`Other(&RawValue)`**).
  `&RawValue` keeps untouched subtrees as borrowed bytes (byte-exact prefix; D-3 thinking signatures survive).
  The request body is already buffered as `Bytes` before `decide()` (`relay.rs:53-58`), so `'a` is the
  buffer's lifetime. **Closed enums for *our* decisions (exhaustive `match`); open `Other` arm for the *wire*
  (fail-open on unknown block shape).**
- `segment.rs` вЂ” `Segment { index, kind, byte_offset, token_estimate, generation, pinned, is_current,
  is_true_human, source_uuids }`; `segment_prompt(&WireBody) -> Vec<Segment>` (deterministic); `fresh_boundary`;
  `RECENCY_WINDOW_N` (const default в‰€ a few full turns, tunable). D-1: server-tool blocks fold into
  ASSISTANT_TURN, in-flight/server unpaired `tool_use` never orphaned. D-4: recency floor *stacks on*
  `is_current`/`fresh_boundary`. `byte_offset` = running sum of preceding block verbatim byte lengths
  (`raw.get().len()`) in provider order (toolsв†’systemв†’messages) вЂ” a monotonic, reproducible position lever;
  the concrete index Layer 4 places `cache_control` on is the **block index** (`BreakpointPlan.positions`).
- `salience.rs` вЂ” `Constraint`/`Decision`/`InFlightWork`/`WorkingState` (bi-temporal: live iff
  `superseded_by.is_none()`); `is_pinned(seg, &WorkingState)` = live-salience в€Ё (USER_TURN в€§ is_true_human).
  `WorkingState` is an **input** (extracted by Layer 3's Rsum folder; Layer 2 only reads it).
- `decision.rs` вЂ” `ContentDecision { choice: ChoiceTag, ranges_to_keep, summary_content }` with
  `normalize()` (bioqa `model_validator` self-repair: truncateв€§no-rangesв†’Keep; summarizeв€§no-contentв†’Compress)
  and `pre_gate(original_len) -> Option<Strategy>` (`PRE_GATE_MIN_CHARS=256`; `result_longer_than_input`). A
  missing `ChoiceTag` arm is now a **compile error** (vs bioqa's stringly `match`).
- `strategy.rs` вЂ” `Strategy { Keep, Truncate(Vec<LineRange>), Summarize(String), ReversibleRef{ref_id,
  summary}, Drop }`; `LADDER_PRIORITY`. `compress в†’ ReversibleRef` is the cc-squash divergence.
- `candidate.rs` вЂ” `SquashCandidate { earliest_offset, suffix_tokens, net_removed, quality_gain, ref_id,
  strategy }` (`ref_id` supplied by Layer 3 scorer, never computed); `SquashBatch` impl `BatchView`
  (suffix=max, removed=ОЈ, quality=ОЈ); `select_strategy(...)` = Keep if `pinned в€Ё npvв‰¤0 в€Ё <256 chars` else
  `match decision.choice`; `HUMAN_VERBATIM_MAX` huge-paste exception ({Keep, ReversibleRef} only).
- `breakpoint.rs` вЂ” `BreakpointPlan { positions }` (в‰¤4); `plan_breakpoints(segments, min_floor)`;
  `cap_cache_hints` (drops EARLIEST first); `CACHE_HINT_CAP=4`, `LOOKBACK_POSITIONS=20`. Takes `min_floor`
  as a plain `TokenCount` so it does **not** depend on economics.
- `budget.rs` вЂ” `soft_pressure(window, just_added) -> Pressure` (OVER_BUDGET when just_added > max_tokens/2,
  max_tokens=0.8В·window); `hard_target(window, max_output) -> max(256, windowв€’max_outputв€’1024)`;
  `default_compact(segments, target) -> Vec<Strategy>` (ladder: strip_reasoning в†’ drop_tool_pairs oldest-first
  в†’ drop_oldest keep-last; droppable routed through ReversibleRef first; returns a **plan**, never bytes).
  D-3 `strip_reasoning`: historical-only, whole-block, branches on BOTH `thinking` AND `redacted_thinking`.
- `controller.rs` вЂ” `PromptState`, `Status { cold, sub_floor, warm_clears, free_bust_imminent }`,
  `SquashDecision { Flush{batch, breakpoint_plan, predicted_bust, predicted_saving} | Hold{reason} |
  RideFreeBust{batch, trigger} }`, `HoldReason`, `FreeBustTrigger`. `Controller::decide(prompt, pending, now)`
  builds `Status` and `match`-es it (sub_floor в†’ cold в†’ free_bust в†’ warm_clears в†’ else WarmDeep), so Rust
  exhaustiveness compiler-enforces every В§1.8 rule has an arm.

### Tunables exposed as `Default` (the config seam, not yet wired)

`RECENCY_WINDOW_N`, `HUMAN_VERBATIM_MAX`, `PRE_GATE_MIN_CHARS`, the NPV bar, and TTL/model defaults live as
`const`s + a `PolicyConfig`/`EconomicsConfig` struct deriving `Default`. Layer 4 will deserialize these from
the seam's `mint{token,config}` slice; Layer 2 ships the `Default` and the types only.

### Build order within Layer 2 (the fan-out)

```
Tier 0  ccs-core                                              (1 agent, lands first)
Tier 1  econ::model В· econ::cache В· pol::wire+segment В·       (6 parallel TDD agents)
        pol::decision В· pol::strategy В· pol::salience-types
Tier 2  econ::cost В· pol::is_pinned В· pol::breakpoint В· pol::budget   (4 parallel)
Tier 3  pol::candidate  (select_strategy + SquashBatch/BatchView вЂ” NPV-fold convergence)
Tier 4  pol::controller (Controller::decide)
```
Tier 1 is where the parallelism is; the crown (candidateв†’controller) is inherently sequential and is where
the proptest invariants live.

### Tests (checkpoint: Pol-*/Cal-*/D-1..D-4 green + proptest invariants hold)

Per-crate `tests/*.rs` integration files (matches the `ccs-proxy/tests/` convention), greppable by suite:
- `ccs-economics/tests/`: `cal_npv.rs`, `cal_floor.rs`, `pol_cold.rs`, `pol_batch.rs`, `prop_economics.rs`.
- `ccs-policy/tests/`: `common/mod.rs` (inline `json!` fixture builders), `pol_ladder.rs`, `pol_replay.rs`,
  `d1_segmentation.rs`, `d2_true_human.rs`, `d3_thinking.rs`, `d4_recency.rs`, `adversarial.rs`, `prop_policy.rs`.

Every assertion is **exact** (`assert_eq!` against hand-computed constants) because the layer is pure with
`now: f64` injected вЂ” no tolerances, no mocks, no flakes. Worked anchors: Opus 4.8, S_after=2000,
T_removed=1000, p_alive=1.0 в†’ `bust=$0.019`, `N*=38.0`, `NPV(38)=$0.0`; forced-5m (w=1.25) в†’ coeff 11.5,
`N*=23.0`. proptest invariants: **batching invariance** (`bust(batch{cв‚Ѓ..c_K}) == bust(min-offset candidate)`,
generator derives suffix from offset so the coupling is the invariant) and **monotonic-shrink** (`ОЈ rewritten
в‰¤ ОЈ original`, equality iff Keep), `with_cases(48)`, committed `.proptest-regressions`. Tier-1 adversarial:
a planted live `Constraint` is never evicted across the full pressure matrix; `select_strategy` is byte-identical
with vs without an injection string in content (decides on structure+economics, never content semantics).

**Fixtures** are hand-built inline `json!` request-body builders (NOT `.jsonl`) вЂ” Layer 2 parses the wire
`messages[]`, and `server_tool_use` is absent from the local corpus so it must be hand-built anyway. Seven
shapes: `client_tool_pair`, `in_flight_tool_use`, `server_tool_turn`, `thinking_turn`, `typed_human`,
`tool_result_record`, `huge_paste`.

### Workspace wiring

- `crates/Cargo.toml` в†’ `members = ["ccs-proxy", "ccs-core", "ccs-economics", "ccs-policy"]` **first** вЂ”
  else `cargo test --all` silently skips the suites and the checkpoint passes vacuously.
- Add `strum = { version = "0.26", features = ["derive"] }` and dev `proptest = "1"` to `[workspace.dependencies]`
  (`serde`/`serde_json`/`memchr` already present). Each crate inherits `version`/`edition`/`license` from
  `[workspace.package]` and opens modules with `#![cfg_attr(not(test), deny(clippy::unwrap_used, clippy::expect_used))]`.

## Potential Pitfalls

- **Workspace `members` first.** Until the three crates are in `members`, `cargo test --all` skips them and CI
  is green-but-empty. This is the single most important first step.
- **Batching-invariance is only physical when suffix is anti-monotonic in offset.** `SquashBatch::suffix_tokens()`
  returns `max(suffix)`; "one bust at `min(p_i)`" holds only when `suffix_i = T_total в€’ offset_i`. The proptest
  generator must **derive suffix from offset**, not pick them independently вЂ” that coupling *is* the invariant.
- **D-3 type-filter trap.** Filtering `type=="thinking"` alone silently drops `redacted_thinking` and breaks the
  multi-turn protocol (в†’ 400). `strip_reasoning` must branch on **both** types and only touch *historical* turns;
  the latest assistant turn's thinking (pending `tool_use`) is hard-immutable.
- **`byte_offset` is a within-buffer position proxy, not Anthropic's internal render offset.** Compute it
  deterministically from `&RawValue` spans; it's the continuous sort/cost key, while `positions` (block indices)
  are what Layer 4 places `cache_control` on.
- **`RefId` must not be fabricatable in Layer 2.** No content-hashing constructor in `ccs-core` вЂ” policy can only
  relay a `RefId` it received on a `SquashCandidate` (sole writer is Layer 3 `ccs-refs`).
- **Closed vs open enums.** Decision domain (`ChoiceTag`/`Strategy`/`Status`/`SquashDecision`/`SegmentKind`) is
  closed and exhaustively matched; wire `ContentBlock` carries `Other(&RawValue)` and folds conservatively
  (treat unknown as non-rewritable). Exhaustiveness guards the logic; tolerance guards the wire.
- **No ambient clock/RNG.** bioqa's sketch references an ambient `NOW()`/`CACHE_FROM(cold)`; in Rust these are
  explicit `now: f64` / `cache: &CacheState` params. A `! rg 'SystemTime::now|Instant::now' crates/ccs-economics
  crates/ccs-policy` grep-gate keeps it honest.
- **Float-exact assertions.** Choose integer tokens + exact-decimal multipliers so break-even cases land exactly
  (`NPV(38)==0.0`); never assert a rounded magic literal вЂ” recompute from the shared `econ` constant.
- **Layer boundary discipline.** `ContentDecision.summary_content` text (Layer 3 summarizer), the `RefId` value
  (Layer 3 store), live `CacheState` refresh (Layer 4 tap), and applying any plan to bytes (Layer 4 Interceptor)
  are all **out of scope** вЂ” Layer 2 consumes inputs and emits prescriptions only.

## Workflow Plan

Main agent tracks layer/task state (`TaskCreate`/`TaskUpdate`), dispatches each tier as a dynamic `Workflow`,
reads each result before dispatching the next, gates on the checkpoint, and reports. Every executor runs at
max model/effort.

| Phase | Shape | Agents | Verification |
|---|---|---|---|
| Scaffold | single | 1 agent: add 3 crates to `members`, workspace deps, crate manifests + `lib.rs` stubs with module skeletons | `cargo check --all` green; crates appear in `cargo metadata` |
| Tier 0 вЂ” ccs-core | single | 1 agent: branded newtypes + tag enums + char-proxy estimator | `cargo test -p ccs-core`; `RefId::parse` rejects non-sha256 |
| Tier 1 вЂ” leaves | parallel | 6 TDD agents (econ::model, econ::cache, pol::wire+segment, pol::decision, pol::strategy, pol::salience-types), each against its Pol-*/Cal-*/D-gate fixtures | per-module `cargo test` green; D-1/D-4 segmentation + Pol-ladder dispatch + Cal cache math exact |
| Tier 2 вЂ” folds | parallel | 4 agents (econ::cost, pol::is_pinned, pol::breakpoint, pol::budget) | Cal-npv/Cal-floor/Pol-cold exact; D-2 pin + D-3 strip_reasoning gates green |
| Tier 3 вЂ” candidate | single | 1 agent: `select_strategy` + `SquashBatch`/`BatchView`; Pol-batch + monotonic-shrink + never-Drop proptests | `prop_economics`/`prop_policy` invariants hold; Pol-ladder NPV-fold cases exact |
| Tier 4 вЂ” controller | single | 1 agent: `Controller::decide` match-state-machine + Pol-replay end-to-end | every `Status` arm covered; Pol-replay exact `SquashDecision` per case |
| Verify (adversarial) | loop-until-dry | 1 adversarial agent re-runs the В§7 checkpoint + a `/codex` second opinion on the NPV math and the batching-invariance coupling | checkpoint met; no `.unwrap()`/`.expect()` outside `#[cfg(test)]`; Tier-1 salience-needle + injection-invariance pass |

## Verification

End-to-end proof the engine is correct and CI-gated:

1. **Build + suite:** from `crates/`, `cargo test --all` runs every new suite (the `members` edit is what makes
   them visible); `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean.
2. **Pol-*/Cal-* green:** `cargo test --all pol_` and `cargo test cal_` pass with exact expected values
   (`bust=$0.019`/`N*=38` warm; `bust=$0` cold; forced-5m coeff 11.5/`N*=23`; sub-floor refused; one bust at
   `min(p_i)`).
3. **D-1..D-4 gates:** `cargo test d1_ d2_ d3_ d4_` вЂ” server-tool folds into ASSISTANT_TURN and no in-flight/server
   `tool_use` is orphaned; a true-human turn is never lossy-compacted (huge paste = ReversibleRef-only);
   `strip_reasoning` never touches the latest turn and drops whole `thinking`+`redacted_thinking`;
   `RECENCY_WINDOW_N` excludes recent-N.
4. **proptest invariants:** batching invariance + monotonic-shrink hold over 48 cases; `.proptest-regressions`
   committed. Plus the cheap universals (coldвџ№bust=0; p_aliveв€€[0,1]; pinnedвџ№Keep; npvв‰¤0вџ№Keep; never-Drop;
   NPV monotonic in N).
5. **Tier-1 adversarial:** a planted live `Constraint` survives the full pressure matrix (never in a candidate
   set, never in a Flush/RideFreeBust batch); `select_strategy` is byte-identical with vs without an injection
   string; a superseded constraint is correctly *not* pinned.
6. **Determinism grep-gate:** `rg 'SystemTime::now|Instant::now|rand::' crates/ccs-economics crates/ccs-policy`
   returns nothing outside test files.
7. **Second opinion:** `/codex` review of the cache-economics NPV/break-even formulas and the suffix-from-offset
   coupling before the layer is declared green.

This layer ships no wiring вЂ” its proof is entirely the offline suite. Layer 4 will consume these crates at the
`relay.rs:62` seam (config over `mint{token,config}`, `CacheState` from the SSE usage tap, the Interceptor
applying `SquashDecision`/`Strategy`/`BreakpointPlan` under a `tokio::time::timeout`).
ops.when: Before implementing Layer 2 of cc-squash: when designing the economics and policy crates (ccs-core/ccs-economics/ccs-policy), their module structure, determinism contract, and API surface
